mapper.insert: INSERT INTO social_notifications (recipient_id, sender_id, type, entity_type, entity_id, message, data, is_read, created_at) VALUES (#{recipientId}, #{senderId}, #{type}, #{entityType}, #{entityId}, #{message}, #{data, typeHandler=com.masasilam.app.typehandler.JsonMapTypeHandler}, FALSE, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE social_notifications SET is_read = TRUE WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE social_notifications SET is_read = TRUE WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId}
mapper.select: SELECT n.id, n.sender_id, u.username AS sender_username, u.profile_picture_url AS sender_photo, n.type, n.entity_type, n.entity_id, n.message, n.data, n.is_read, n.created_at FROM social_notifications n LEFT JOIN users u ON u.id = n.sender_id WHERE n.recipient_id = #{recipientId} ORDER BY n.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM social_notifications WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId} AND is_read = FALSE
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM social_notifications WHERE recipient_id = #{recipientId}
